content.query:
IF OBJECT_ID('silver.patients', 'U') IS NOT NULL
    DROP TABLE silver.patients;
GO

CREATE TABLE silver.patients
(
    patient_id    INT           NULL,
    patient_name  VARCHAR(200)  NULL,
    gender        VARCHAR(50)   NULL
)
WITH
(
    DISTRIBUTION = ROUND_ROBIN,
    HEAP
);
GO

IF OBJECT_ID('silver.visits', 'U') IS NOT NULL
    DROP TABLE silver.visits;
GO

CREATE TABLE silver.visits
(
    visit_id      INT           NULL,
    patient_id    INT           NULL,
    visit_date    DATE          NULL
)
WITH
(
    DISTRIBUTION = ROUND_ROBIN,
    HEAP
);
GO
